description: Shein flew influencers to a factory in China in 2023 to showcase good working conditions. The trip was widely mocked for being 'PR-washing' and ignoring labor rights criticisms.

key_events.description: Influencers post clips of the 'clean' factory; social media users debunk them with investigative reports.
Users start leaving negative comments on the influencers' personal social media accounts.
Fashion sustainability experts publish detailed analyses of Shein's labor practices.

calibration_notes: Useful for calibration regarding 'influencer marketing' backlash and the limitations of staged transparency.
